content.en:
"Thirteen pieces of black-scaled true armor, one star-patrolling sky wing, and one sky-killing battle spear. "

This is the super-dimensional Dao soldier that Ye Tian is currently refining.

The Star Patrol Sky Wing and the Sky Killing Spear couldn't stack the effect, so he only refined one, but the defensive super dimensional Dao soldiers like the Black Scale True Armor could be stacked, so he had been refining the Black Scale True Armor.

Now, thirteen pieces of black-scaled true armor are not impossible to resist even the blow of the second realm transcendent realm.

And in the first realm, in the extradimensional realm, there was almost no one who could break his defenses.

After that, Ye Tian did not continue to refine the super-dimensional Dao soldiers, he was now mainly using some resources to improve his cultivation, focusing on improving his cultivation, rather than refining a large number of low-level super-dimensional Dao soldiers.

After all, he comprehended the rules of the super dimension, and the second realm did not have any bottlenecks for him, and before he broke through to the second realm with "five five three", then the role of these low-level super dimensional dao soldiers would not be great.

Therefore, he couldn't waste his resources on refining the Extradimensional Dao.

Of course.

He could also choose to refine extradimensional dao soldiers to sell, but this was too easy to notice.

And if you sell too many extra-dimensional Dao soldiers, it is easy to arouse the hostility of a force, and this force is the Treasure Refining Building.

Many of the super-dimensional Dao soldiers in the 6,000 territory are from the Treasure Refining Building, and selling a large number of super-dimensional Dao soldiers is undoubtedly a business with the Treasure Refining Building.

"Next, practice in retreat and strive to elevate your cultivation to the middle level of the first realm. "

And so.

Except for occasionally collecting resources, he spends most of his time improving his cultivation, and with the assistance of extradimensional rules, his cultivation is improving much faster than before.

And he occasionally studied the black statue, but unfortunately he couldn't study it.

......

Before you know it, twenty extradimensional years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian had spent countless resources, and his cultivation was already very close to the middle stage of the first realm transcendent realm, and it was estimated that it would not be long before he could break through.

this day.

The Six-Winged Family recruited a large number of extradimensional realms in an attempt to deal with an extradimensional race.

Moreover, the conditions given by the Six-Winged Family were extremely attractive, even Ye Tian was moved.

"A mysterious fragment containing extradimensional rules. "

This is the condition given by the Six-Winged Family.

Of course, if you want to directly obtain this treasure, you need to pay a lot of credit, but every extradimensional realm who participates in the action can get the opportunity to participate in an extradimensional era.

For many extradimensional realms, any opportunity to comprehend extradimensional rules must be grasped.

It is conceivable that many extradimensional realms trapped at the peak of the first realm will participate in this operation.

As for which extradimensional race the Six-Winged Family wants to deal with, it has not yet been announced, and only by going to the Six-Winged Family, the Six-Winged Family will be announced, which is also to prevent the news from leaking, so that the extra-dimensional race can be prepared or escape.

After Ye Tian learned the news, he quickly rushed to the headquarters of the Six-Winged Family.

Six-winged Sacred Mountain.

Ye Tian came here and sensed a lot of extra-dimensional realms, most of which were not extra-dimensional realms of the Six-Winged Family, but extra-dimensional realms from the outside world.

These extradimensional realms are naturally here for the mysterious fragments that contain extradimensional rules.

After Ye Tian came to the Six-Winged Sacred Mountain, the Six-Winged Family sent a half-step extradimensional realm to entertain him.

During this time, he also chatted with many extradimensional realms, but they didn't know what the specific task was.

After a period of time, almost all the extradimensional realms should have come, and the head of the Six-Winged Family, the powerhouse of the second extradimensional realm, the Lord of the Golden Winged Realm, came.

"I've seen the Lord of the Golden Winged Realm!"

The extradimensional realms said respectfully.

The Golden-Winged Realm Lord smiled and said, "I'm very happy that all of you extradimensional realms can come and participate in this operation. However, in order for the news to leak out, you need to make an extradimensional oath not to allow any information about the conversation here to be leaked. "

"No problem!"

Seeing this, the Golden Winged Realm Lord revealed: "This time, what our Six-Winged Family has to deal with is the extradimensional race, the Nine-Star Pluto Snake Clan. "

"What, it turned out to be the Nine-Star Snake !!!"

All the extradimensional realms were shocked, and even showed a hint of fear.

The nine-star pluto snake clan, the lair is located in the territory of 6006, occupying a huge area, and even occupies an extra-dimensional realm, and countless races containing the blood of the nine-star pluto snake have been bred within that extra-dimensional realm... 0

According to their understanding, the Nine-Star Immortal Snake clan has three powerhouses of the Second Realm of the Extradimensional Realm, there are at least hundreds of Nine-Star Snakes of the First Realm, and there are even more Nine-Star Snakes of the Half-Step Transcendent Realm. []

In terms of strength, the six-winged family is not as good as the nine-star snake clan.

It's just that the Nine-Star Dark Snake Clan is a super-dimensional creature, and it takes the bloodline route of extra-dimensional creatures, while the Six-Winged Family takes the path of cultivators, which is the mainstream route.

In terms of wisdom, the Nine-Star Snake Clan is naturally much worse, because extra-dimensional creatures are all low-intelligence, and even if they are extra-dimensional creatures in the extra-dimensional realm, their wisdom is not too high.

The Six-Winged Family is not as good as the Nine-Star Snake Clan, but it can use external forces to deal with the Nine-Star Snake Clan.

But even so, if the Six-Winged Family wants to conquer the Nine-Star Dark Snake Clan, it will have to pay a heavy price!

If there were any killer tactics or other means left in the lair of the Nine-Star Dark Snake, maybe the Six-Winged Family would have to suffer heavy losses or even be destroyed.

In this case, why did the Six-Winged Family dare to attack the Nine-Star Dark Snake Clan.

And for what purpose?

"Golden Winged Realm Lord, why did the Six-Winged Family want to attack the Nine-Star Dark Snake Clan, how sure are they, if not, I don't dare to get involved. A transcendent realm cultivator at the peak of the first realm asked.

Other extra-dimensional realms are also staring at the Golden Wings 3.0 realm masters, they do need mysterious fragments containing extradimensional rules, but they are also very clear that it is impossible to comprehend extradimensional rules just by comprehending one extradimensional era.

Therefore, they will not risk their lives for the slightest hope of comprehending the rules of the extradimensional.

Seeing that many extradimensional realms were panicked, the Golden Winged Realm Lord hurriedly introduced: "Everyone, the three second realm transcendent realms of the Nine Star Hades Snake Clan, our Six-Winged Family can deal with them. Moreover, our Six-Winged Family will also dispatch thirty-eight First Realms, plus the more than two hundred First Realms recruited this time, and several extradimensional forces are also allies of our Six-Winged Family, and more than a hundred Extradimensional Realms will also be dispatched. In terms of the number of the first transcendent realm, we also have an advantage. Therefore, the success rate of this operation is still very high. "。
